touches.subject: Flexible warehouse space near the ports — {{unit_sf}} sf available at Cubework Fontana
Re: Cubework Fontana — {{unit}} still available
touches.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just circling back on the unit I mentioned. We still have {{unit}} ({{unit_sf}} sf{{#dock}}, dock-high{{/dock}}) available at {{rate}}.{{#alt_option}} I also have {{alt_option}} if the size isn't quite the right fit.{{/alt_option}}

Flexible terms — month-to-month is an option if you need it. Happy to do a quick 15-minute tour whenever works for you.

Best,
Justin

touches.subject: What's included with your space at Cubework Fontana
touches.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Wanted to share a bit more context on why a few tenants specifically chose Cubework over cheaper alternatives they were looking at:

{{included_items}} are included — no surprise utility bills at the end of the month.
{{#importer}}Cubeship handles container freight, customs, and last-mile from the same location.{{/importer}}{{^importer}}No long lease to get in — month-to-month available so you're not locked in.{{/importer}}
24/7 access, loading, and security.

Still have {{unit}} at {{rate}} — worth a 15-minute look?

Best,
Justin

touches.subject: Quick question about your space needs — Cubework Fontana
touches.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Quick question: what's the one thing that would need to be true about a space for it to be worth a tour?

Asking because I want to make sure I'm not wasting your time — and if {{unit}} ({{unit_sf}} sf, {{rate}}) doesn't fit what you need right now, I'd rather know.{{#alt_option}} I also have {{alt_option}} if the current unit isn't the right size.{{/alt_option}}

Either way, happy to give you a straight answer on whether we can make it work.

Best,
Justin

touches.subject: Last note — Cubework Fontana space for {{company}}
touches.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I'll keep this short — I've reached out a few times about the {{unit_sf}} sf unit at Cubework Fontana and haven't heard back. Totally fine if the timing isn't right or if it's not a fit.

I'll leave it here. If things change and you're looking for flexible warehouse space near the ports, feel free to reach back out — I'm usually quick to respond.

Wishing you and {{company}} the best.

Justin Cho
Business Development — Cubework Fontana
